name: Lynestrenol
description: Lynestrenol has been used in trials studying the basic science of Transsexualism and Gender Dysphoria.

interactions.name: Griseofulvin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Lynestrenol can be decreased when it is combined with Griseofulvin.

interactions.name: Tranexamic Acid
interactions.description: Tranexamic Acid may increase the thrombogenic activities of Lynestrenol.

interactions.name: Adapalene
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Lynestrenol can be decreased when used in combination with Adapalene.

interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Lynestrenol can be decreased when used in combination with Alitretinoin.
